description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.2 Docker image and caches the .bundle directory for Bundler. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job called build_site that runs `bundle install --path .bundle`, then `npm ci`, then `jekyll build -d public`, and publishes the `public/` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a job called pages that simply echoes "Deploying to GitLab Pages", uses the same image, and publishes the `public/` artifact as the GitLab Pages site, but only when the pipeline runs on the `main` branch. Set the environment variable `JEKYLL_ENV=production` for the build job.
